description: Sasha celebrates the creative wins that only other creatives understand

made_something: <break time="350ms"/>You made something. <break time="300ms"/>Full stop. <break time="250ms"/>That's the win.
<break time="400ms"/>Something exists now that didn't before. <break time="350ms"/>Because of you.
<break time="350ms"/>The thing is made. <break time="300ms"/>Quality doesn't matter. <break time="250ms"/>Existence matters.
started_something: <break time="400ms"/>You started? <break time="350ms"/>Starting is the hardest part. <break time="300ms"/>You did the hardest part.
<break time="350ms"/>The blank page is terrifying. <break time="300ms"/>And you faced it. <break time="250ms"/>That's huge.
<break time="400ms"/>Beginning takes more courage than finishing. <break time="350ms"/>You did the brave thing.
kept_going: <break time="350ms"/>You kept going. <break time="300ms"/>Despite the doubt. <break time="250ms"/>That's resilience.
<break time="400ms"/>You showed up again. <break time="350ms"/>That's what matters.
<break time="350ms"/>Consistency beats inspiration every time. <break time="300ms"/>And you're being consistent.

shared_work: <break time="400ms"/>You showed someone? <break time="350ms"/>That takes guts. <break time="300ms"/>Real guts.
<break time="350ms"/>Sharing work is terrifying. <break time="300ms"/>You did a terrifying thing.
<break time="400ms"/>Putting your work out there makes you vulnerable. <break time="350ms"/>And you did it anyway.
received_feedback: <break time="350ms"/>You got feedback and you're still standing. <break time="300ms"/>That's strength.
<break time="400ms"/>Feedback can crush you or grow you. <break time="350ms"/>You're choosing growth.
<break time="350ms"/>The fact that you asked for feedback <break time="300ms"/>shows you're serious. <break time="250ms"/>That's brave.
tried_something_new: <break time="400ms"/>New territory! <break time="350ms"/>That's where growth happens. <break time="300ms"/>And it's scary. <break time="250ms"/>But you went.
<break time="350ms"/>Trying something new means risking being bad at it. <break time="300ms"/>You took that risk.
<break time="400ms"/>Beginners mind is powerful. <break time="350ms"/>And humbling. <break time="300ms"/>Good for you.

thought_about_creating: <break time="350ms"/>You thought about your work today. <break time="300ms"/>Mental engagement counts. <break time="250ms"/>It's still progress.
<break time="400ms"/>Planning is creating. <break time="350ms"/>Dreaming is creating. <break time="300ms"/>It all counts.
<break time="350ms"/>Your creative brain is working <break time="300ms"/>even when you're not actively making. <break time="250ms"/>Trust that.
didnt_quit: <break time="400ms"/>You're still here. <break time="350ms"/>Still trying. <break time="300ms"/>That's not nothing.
<break time="350ms"/>The blocks haven't beaten you. <break time="300ms"/>You're still showing up. <break time="250ms"/>That's everything.
<break time="400ms"/>You haven't given up. <break time="350ms"/>After everything. <break time="300ms"/>That's the win.
